creator: ben@scientia.demon.co.uk
text:
Rich Morin wrote:

> Thanks for looking into these, but wouldn't it be useful to give
> a hint in the audit trail as to what you did?

Maybe, I tend to be fairly lazy writing PR close messages though...

I just removed the directories from /usr/src/etc/mtree/BSD.usr.dist,
which won't remove the directories on any existing systems, it just
means they won't make it into any more releases, so a clean install of
4.3 when it comes out won't have these directories.  Or maybe you knew
this already and think the information should be there for the benefit
of others.

Anyway I cc'd this to the gnats-submit address so it should make it into
the PR...

--
